positive: A central, symmetrical composition of a stylized woodland sentinel beast, incorporating elements of cervidae (deer) and celestial geometry. The design must be rendered in a modern graphic novel/tattoo style with strong, clean silhouettes and bold outlines. The scene features bioluminescent, stylized flora and subtle lunar constellation patterns framing the main subject. The color palette should emphasize deep indigo, glowing emerald, charcoal black, and luminous silver. The composition must use negative space effectively and have extreme contrast, suitable for a single-color or two-color apparel screen print. Clean vector art aesthetic, perfect for merchandising.
